title: Method for controlling unlocking and terminal
abstract: A method for controlling unlocking includes the follows. When a touch operation of a finger of a user on a fingerprint recognition sensor of a terminal is detected, N first fingerprint images are received according to N capacity auto control (CAC) parameters corresponding to a default finger, and M second fingerprint images are received according to M CAC parameters corresponding to fingerprint stabilization, wherein N is a positive integer, and M is an integer greater than 1ĂŻÂĽÂ› the best fingerprint image of the N first fingerprint images and the M second fingerprint images is selected; the selected fingerprint image is compared; the terminal is unlocked when the selected fingerprint image is matched.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) AĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â controllingĂ‚Â unlocking,Ă‚Â comprising: whenĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â touchĂ‚Â operationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â fingerĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â userĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â recognitionĂ‚Â sensorĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â terminalĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â detected,Ă‚Â receivingĂ‚Â NĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â NĂ‚Â capacityĂ‚Â autoĂ‚Â controlĂ‚Â (CAC)Ă‚Â parametersĂ‚Â correspondingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â defaultĂ‚Â finger,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â receivingĂ‚Â MĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â MĂ‚Â CACĂ‚Â parametersĂ‚Â correspondingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â stabilization,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â NĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â positiveĂ‚Â integer,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â MĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â integerĂ‚Â greaterĂ‚Â thanĂ‚Â 1ĂŻÂĽÂ› selectingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â bestĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â NĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â MĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â imagesĂŻÂĽÂ› matchingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â selectedĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â imageĂŻÂĽÂ›Ă‚Â and unlockingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â terminalĂ‚Â whenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â selectedĂ‚Â fingerprintĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â matched.
